prestazioni: Mercedes-AMG M139-derived M14D 1.6L V6 hybrid turbocharged power unit (engine code: M14D E-Turbo) upgraded with a Garrett GTX5544R Gen II turbocharger (86mm billet compressor wheel, 106mm turbine, 64mm wastegate) and a custom Pectel SQ6M ECU remap targeting 950hp at 12,500 RPM with 3.5 bar boost pressure, utilizing Motec PDM30 power distribution modules for precise fuel and ignition control under extreme loads

Full titanium exhaust system by Akrapović with 4-2-1 equal-length headers (Inconel 625 material), 3.5-inch diameter titanium downpipes, and a centrally mounted 5-inch carbon fiber exit, paired with a secondary bypass valve system for on-demand backpressure reduction during high-RPM overtakes

Ohlins TTX46 MkII 4-way adjustable coilovers with McLaren-specific spring rates (450 lb/in front, 550 lb/in rear) and custom valving for the MCL36’s hydraulic heave damper system, integrated with a Wavetrac ATB differential (85% lock under power) and Brembo GT-R monobloc calipers (6-piston front, 4-piston rear) with 410mm carbon-ceramic rotors and Ferodo DS3000 brake pads for sustained 3G deceleration
estetica: Rocket Bunny V3 widebody kit for the MCL36, featuring 3D-scanned carbon fiber overfenders (2.5-inch wider front, 3-inch wider rear) with integrated canards and a custom front splitter with active Gurney flaps (adjustable via McLaren’s hydraulic ride height system)

Vorsteiner V-RT 1200 carbon fiber rear diffuser with integrated titanium strakes and a central exhaust outlet, paired with a custom rear wing (3D-printed from aerospace-grade aluminum) with dual active DRS flaps and a 1,200mm span, generating 1,800 lbs of downforce at 200 mph (verified in Sauber’s wind tunnel)

Full carbon fiber interior retrofit by Sabelt, including a monocoque-hugging bucket seat (FIA 8862-2018 certified) with 6-point harnesses, a custom roll cage (T45 steel, MIG-welded) integrated with the MCL36’s existing crash structure, and a Motec C187 dash display replacing the stock unit for real-time telemetry (boost, oil pressure, G-forces, and lap delta)
